name: loom
description: AI-powered development orchestration: a CLI + daemon that coordinates AI development workers using git worktrees and a forge (GitHub or Gitea) as the coordination layer.

scripts.daemon:build: cargo build --package loom-daemon --release && rm -f target/release/loom-daemon-aarch64-apple-darwin && cp target/release/loom-daemon target/release/loom-daemon-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.test:python: cd loom-tools && uv run pytest tests/ -x -q
scripts.check:all: pnpm format:rust && pnpm clippy && pnpm check && pnpm test
scripts.check:ci: pnpm format:rust && pnpm clippy:locked && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm test:python
